---

✅ 1. Pre‑Flight Checks (Global System Validation)

• Verify build integrity — App compiles with no warnings or errors
• Check environment variables — All required values present
• Confirm routing stability — No broken links or dead routes
• Validate responsive layout — Mobile, tablet, desktop
• Test dark‑theme consistency — Colors, contrast, glow effects


---

🔐 2. Authentication QA

• Role selection works — Civilian, Examiner, Officer, Agent, Admin
• Login flow validates correctly — Email, password, error states
• Signup flow handles edge cases — Weak passwords, duplicates
• Credential box displays safely — No sensitive leakage
• Unauthorized access blocked — Role‑restricted pages


---

🚗 3. SVIN / EVIN Vehicle Registration QA

• Wizard steps progress correctly
• Field validation works — Required fields, formats
• Preview card renders accurately
• Submission success screen triggers
• Back/forward navigation safe — No data loss


---

🛰️ 4. Appointment Scheduling QA

• License class cards load — O‑1 through EVA‑1
• Calendar date selection works
• Examiner list populates
• Booking summary accurate
• Confirmation screen stable


---

🎨 5. UI/UX Component QA

• Topbar renders correctly
• AppLayout wraps pages properly
• NewsTicker scrolls smoothly
• HeroSection responsive
• QuickActions clickable
• StatsBar displays correct values
• AboutSection readable
• HomeFooter links functional


---

🧩 6. Layout & Navigation QA

• All pages load without flicker
• Breadcrumbs (if used) accurate
• Back button behavior consistent
• Scroll behavior smooth
• No overlapping elements


---

♿ 7. Accessibility QA

• Keyboard navigation works
• ARIA labels present
• Color contrast passes WCAG
• Screen reader compatibility
• Focus states visible


---

🔒 8. Security QA (Frontend)

• Input sanitization works
• No sensitive data in console
• Role‑restricted UI hidden
• Form tampering blocked
• Navigation guard behavior


---

🧪 9. Regression QA

• Test previously fixed bugs
• Check for reintroduced issues
• Validate core workflows — Auth, SVIN, EVIN, Scheduling


---

📦 10. Pre‑Release QA

• Verify version bump
• Update changelog
• Smoke test entire app
• Docs updated
• Release candidate approved


---
